title: Better Bonkus
description: A collection of performance mods for a Vanilla SMP
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68849f3e86f25c9d4dfeb104f3525d5d0c2cbffe.png)

-----

Better Bonkus is a modpack designed for the Survival SMP "Bonkus", in order to increase performance for all members playing. The SMP itself is Vanilla, so all mods inside of the pack are Client-Side and Vanilla Friendly. The mods in the pack consist mostly of performance mods, such as Sodium, and small quality of life mods, such as Mouse Tweaks.

Overall, the modpack should increase the quality of life for anyone using it on the server.

I also reccomend turning down certain settings such as Distant Horizons before joining a server, as lesser computers may have trouble rendering the visuals provided by the mod.

The pack will also include some optional features, such as shaders, resource packs, and more.

## Reccomended Resource Packs

Colorful Sheared Sheep: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/colorful-sheared-sheep

Vanilla Tweaks (Not Included): https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/

Xali's Enchanted Books: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/xalis-enchanted-books

Xali's Potion: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/xalis-potion
